collectiondata.overview:
Winter Wanderlust: Embrace the Magic of Frost-Kissed Escapes

Step into a world sculpted by snowflakes and illuminated by the soft glow of winter sunrises—welcome to our Winter Wanderlust header menu at Travelxploria. As a leading Best Travel Agency, we invite you to explore a curated selection of snow-blanketed retreats, ice-rimmed lakes, and festive mountain villages. Whether you’re chasing the glow of the Northern Lights, craving cozy cabin seclusion, or seeking an adrenaline rush on powdery slopes, our itineraries transform frosty dreams into warm memories.

Picture waking to the crisp hush of a winter morning, where steam rises from steaming mugs of cocoa and frost patterns trace delicate lace on windowpanes. Our signature best package options blend heart-pounding activities—like heli-skiing on pristine alpine runs and snowmobiling through silent forests—with moments of serene relaxation. Spend your afternoons wandering lantern-lit lanes at a charming Christmas market, sampling spiced treats baked by local artisans, then retreat to a wood-fired sauna as snowflakes drift outside.

For honeymooners dreaming of an enchanting winter romance, our best honeymoon package offers private chalet stays complete with glass-roofed hot tubs under starlit skies. Imagine toasting champagne as you watch the aurora borealis dance overhead, or sharing a horse-drawn sleigh ride through glittering pines. Our honeymoon specialists partner with boutique inns and luxury resorts to sprinkle each moment with surprise rose petals, personalized love notes, and candlelit dinner arrangements—ensuring your first days as newlyweds feel nothing short of magical.

Families seeking a frosty celebration will delight in our tailored family package experiences. Build snowmen on frozen lake shores, embark on guided snowshoe treks to hidden ice caves, and join friendly huskies for a thrilling dog-sled adventure. Even the littlest explorers can try ice-fishing under expert supervision, while parents unwind beside roaring fireplaces with plush blankets and panoramic mountain views. With Travelxploria as your trusted Best Tour Operator, every safety detail is managed, leaving room for the laughter and joy of winter play.

Crossing hemispheres or continents? Rely on our credentials as the Best International Tour Operator and Best International Travel Agent to handle every winter travel nuance. From arranging seamless transfers to setting up private ski instructors on European slopes, our global network ensures you focus on carving turns, not logistics. Seek the chic après-ski scene of the French Alps, the surreal ice hotels of Scandinavia, or the untouched powder fields of Japan’s northern island—each destination meticulously planned for maximum wonder.

Our Winter Wanderlust theme also celebrates sustainable, low-impact travel. We partner with eco-friendly lodges warmed by renewable energy, support local winter festivals that preserve folk traditions, and offer carbon-offset programs on every booking. These thoughtful choices make Travelxploria the architect of the best value tour package, balancing unforgettable experiences with responsible stewardship of delicate winter ecosystems.

No two travelers share the same vision of a perfect winter escape—so we make personalization our hallmark. Craving a midnight snowshoe trek beneath a full moon? Consider it scheduled. Dreaming of a private ice-sculpting workshop led by a local artisan? We’ll arrange it. Yearning for a gourmet tasting menu featuring truffle-infused fondue amid cozy alpine décor? Your personal culinary concierge awaits. This bespoke approach transforms a standard journey into a deeply personal narrative you’ll recount for years to come.

As you hover over our “Winter Wanderlust” menu, let the promise of crystalline mornings, cinnamon-scented evenings, and exhilarating winter pursuits spark your imagination. With Travelxploria—your Best Travel Agency and unrivaled Best Tour Operator—you’re not simply booking a trip; you’re crafting a snow-dusted chapter of your travel story. Embrace the season’s magic today, and let the world’s most enchanting winter landscapes reveal their wonders.

packages.overview:
• Begin your Swiss adventure in the scenic city of Zurich.

  • Explore Lucerne and enjoy stunning alpine views from Mount Titlis.

  • Journey to the “Top of Europe” for breathtaking snowy vistas.

  • Relax or explore Zurich at your own pace.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris on a comfortable train.

  • Discover Parisian landmarks and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Enjoy a magical day at Disneyland Paris with thrilling rides and entertainment.

  • Shop, dine, or explore more of Paris at your own pace.

  • Bid farewell to Europe with unforgettable memories.

Embark on a breathtaking journey to Mount Titlis and the charming city of Lucerne, guided by our expert Travelxploria representative and the best on-ground support staff. Begin by exploring Lucerne's historic Old Town, Chapel Bridge, and the Lion Monument, immersing yourself in the city's rich history. Then, ascend into the heart of the Swiss Alps, where you'll ride the Rotair revolving cable car to 3,020 meters (9,908 feet). Once at the top, experience the Glacier Cave, Ice Flyer Chairlift, and Europe's highest suspension bridge, the Cliff Walk. Revel in snow-capped peaks, thrilling activities, and stunning alpine views on this unforgettable Swiss adventure, brought to you by Travelxploria, the best travel agency.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.overview:
• Touch down in Zurich and settle into the heart of Switzerland.

  • Explore Zurich’s highlights, enjoy a lake cruise, and visit the Lindt Home of Chocolate.

  • Travel to the luxurious alpine resort town of St. Moritz.

  • Embark on a scenic ride aboard the world-famous Glacier Express.

  • Journey from the Matterhorn village to the lakeside city of Geneva.

  • Discover the breathtaking beauty of the French Alps on a full-day excursion.

  • Bid farewell to Switzerland with unforgettable alpine memories.

Your Zurich adventure begins as you meet our friendly Travelxploria representative, ready to guide you through this stunning Swiss city. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, immerse yourself in Zurich’s rich history, culture, and breathtaking scenery. Stroll along the famous Bahnhofstrasse, explore the charming Old Town, and soak in the tranquil beauty of Lake Zurich. Then, hop aboard a scenic boat cruise, gliding past the city’s picturesque skyline from a whole new perspective. The journey culminates at the Lindt Home of Chocolate, where the secrets of Swiss chocolate-making come to life. Indulge in irresistible tastings and witness the artistry behind Switzerland’s finest confections. With Travelxploria—the best travel agency—every detail is expertly handled, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience. From history to indulgence, this tour offers the perfect blend of culture, relaxation, and sweet delights.

Experience the breathtaking beauty of Zermatt and Mt. Gornergrat with your Travelxploria representative, ensuring the most unforgettable journey through the Swiss Alps. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, begin your adventure with a scenic village walk through Zermatt, a charming, car-free town nestled at the base of the legendary Matterhorn. Wander past traditional wooden chalets, historic churches, and vibrant streets before boarding the iconic Gornergrat Railway, Europe’s highest open-air cogwheel train. As you ascend to 3,089 meters, be mesmerized by panoramic views of the Matterhorn and 29 other towering, snow-covered peaks. Capture stunning photographs, breathe in the crisp mountain air, and revel in the serenity of the Alps. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, this once-in-a-lifetime experience blends nature, adventure, and Swiss charm into a journey you’ll cherish forever.

After breakfast in the picturesque mountain village of Zermatt, check out from your hotel and make your way to the train station for a scenic journey to Geneva. The train ride offers stunning views of the Swiss Alps, tranquil lakes, and charming countryside as you descend from the high-altitude serenity of Zermatt to the cosmopolitan elegance of Geneva. Relax in comfort as you travel through some of Switzerland’s most beautiful landscapes. Upon arrival, you’ll be transferred to your hotel. Take the rest of the day to unwind or begin exploring Geneva’s beautiful lakeside promenades, international flair, and historic Old Town.

packages.overview:
• France – Wander through the romantic streets of Paris, marvel at the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and Notre-Dame, and visit the historic charm of Rouen.
  • United Kingdom – Experience the royal grandeur of London, explore the medieval beauty of Durham, admire Edinburgh’s castles, and soak in the vibrant culture of Glasgow, Liverpool, and Dublin.
  • Netherlands – Discover the picturesque canals and rich artistic heritage of Amsterdam, home to Van Gogh Museum and Anne Frank House.
  • Belgium – Stroll through the medieval squares of Brussels and Bruges, and indulge in world-famous Belgian chocolates and waffles.
  • Germany – Explore the historic sites of Berlin, the fairytale castles of Bavaria, and the cultural vibrance of Frankfurt and Cologne.
  • Switzerland – Witness the Swiss Alps’ breathtaking beauty, visit Zurich, Lucerne, and Interlaken, and enjoy a scenic ride on the Glacier Express.
  • Italy – Step back in time with the Colosseum in Rome, explore the romantic canals of Venice, admire Florence’s Renaissance art, and relax on the stunning coastline of Amalfi.
  • Spain – Immerse in the artistic and architectural wonders of Barcelona and Madrid, experience the passion of flamenco in Seville, and soak up the sun in Costa del Sol.
  • Austria – Enjoy the imperial beauty of Vienna, the musical heritage of Salzburg, and the stunning landscapes of Innsbruck.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Rome","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171054-istockphoto-501396596-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171175-istockphoto-508540910-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Rome/1741006171236-istockphoto-539115110-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Rome","day_summary":"

Welcome to Rome! As you arrive in the Eternal City, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel. After you’ve settled in, our guide will personally meet you, sharing essential details about your journey ahead. You can also find helpful information at the hotel reception. In the evening, we’ll take you to Via Cavour, a perfect introduction to Rome’s vibrant atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets and explore a variety of restaurants, setting the stage for an unforgettable adventure.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome Fiumicino Airport","to":"Rome","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":661,"h_name":"Ergife Palace Hotel","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Rome","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856129-2024-05-31.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856238-unnamed (19).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Rome/Ergife Palace Hotel/1741088856244-unnamed (18).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Rome City Tour","day_summary":"

In the morning, we’ll enjoy a panoramic tour of Italy’s capital, the Eternal City, one of the oldest and most influential cities in Western civilization. We’ll combine a walking tour with a panoramic bus ride. During the walking tour, we´ll admire the Arch of Constantine, the Colosseum (from the outside), and the impressive Imperial Forums. After that, we’ll continue by bus, exploring this open-air-museum city with majestic basilicas and churches, passing by Tiber Island, Lungotevere Avenue, and Castel Sant´Angelo. The tour will finish at Vatican City, an independent state within Rome and the center of the Catholic Church. The afternoon will be free. We recommend visiting St. Peter’s Basilica and the Vatican Museums.

In the evening, we’ll provide a transfer to Trastevere, perfect for a leisurely stroll through its charming, narrow cobblestone streets. This district is rich in hidden gems, from quaint medieval churches and quirky shops selling unique items to everyday scenes of local life. You’ll find many trattorias (casual eating establishments, typically less formal than a ristorante) and osterias (similar to taverns), each exuding Italian charm and ready to serve you authentic local dishes. Additionally, the area offers a variety of restaurants serving Indian, Chinese, and international cuisine. We’ll return to the hotel at the end of the evening.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Florence","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1747246882990-AdobeStock_260554885-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289621-istockphoto-1088920100-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Florence/1741006289665-istockphoto-1136673014-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Rome to Florence","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll leave Rome and head north, taking in the beautiful landscapes along the way. Upon reaching Florence, we’ll go directly to the stunning Piazzale Michelangelo for breathtaking views of the city. In the evening, we’ll enjoy a guided walking tour with a local expert through the historic center, visiting landmarks such as the Ponte Vecchio, the Duomo, and Piazza della Signoria. This city is like an open-air museum. Afterward, you´ll have some free time to explore at your leisure. In the evening, you’ll have plenty of options for dinner, as this district offers many restaurants with a variety of international cuisines.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Rome","to":"Florence","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":678,"h_name":"Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto","h_country":"Italy","h_city":"Florence","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956443-2024-07-01 (2).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956518-unnamed (40).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Florence/Novotel Firenze Nord Aeroporto/1741152956623-2023-01-18.jpg\"}]"}]}}]}]},{"city":"Venice","country":"Italy","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336475-istockphoto-1200916277-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336571-istockphoto-1388018793-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Italy/Venice/1741006336619-istockphoto-911570904-612x612.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Florence to Venice","day_summary":"

Today, we’ll enjoy the stunning mountain landscapes as we cross the Apennines. Upon arriving in Venice, we’ll take a boat across the Giudecca Canal to the Island of Venice. With a local guide, we’ll visit the marvelous St. Mark’s Square. Afterwards, we’ll tour the Murano Glass Factory, where you’ll see the fascinating techniques used to create this ancient glass. You´ll have some free time to explore on your own. Accommodation will be in the Mestre district.

We’ll depart Venice and make our way to Austria. Upon arriving in Innsbruck, you’ll have time to explore the historic town center and enjoy lunch. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey through the beautiful Tyrolean landscapes as we cross into Switzerland, arriving in Zurich.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Venice","to":"Zurich","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":679,"h_name":"Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport","h_country":"Switzerland","h_city":"Zurich","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-unnamed (42).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125931-2024-07-01 (3).jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Zurich/Mövenpick Hotel Zürich Airport/1741153125969-unnamed (41).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Zurich to Lucerne to Zurich","day_summary":"

Today´s journey features stunning landscapes with tall mountains and pristine lakes. We’ll enjoy breathtaking scenery in the Interlaken region. Our first stop will be Grindelwald, where we’ll have time for a coffee before taking the cable car up the mountain. Once there, we’ll walk along a winding path leading to a suspended bridge. For those who are adventurous, crossing the bridge offers spectacular views of the surrounding glaciers. We’ll have lunch on the mountain (included) before heading back down. Our next destination is Lucerne, one of Switzerland´s most beautiful cities, where you’ll have time to explore and enjoy the charming cityscape. We’ll then return to Zurich.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Paris","country":"France","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976316-istockphoto-689710224-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976390-istockphoto-135034702-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741005976428-istockphoto-847408280-612x612.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/France/Paris/1741635794864-AdobeStock_730104594-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Zurich to Strasbourgh to Paris","day_summary":"

We’ll depart from Zurich and travel to the French region of Alsace, where we’ll visit its capital, Strasbourg a charming city that beautifully blends French and German influences. You’ll have time to explore and get to know the city. Afterward, we’ll continue our journey to Paris, arriving in the evening.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Zurich","to":"Paris","splitStops":[]}},{"type":"hotel","groupedData":{"4":[{"h_id":681,"h_name":"Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie","h_country":"France","h_city":"Paris","h_type":"Hotel","h_rating":"4","status":"A","h_images":null,"supplier":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","edited_by_id":null,"price":null,"room_type":null,"images":"[{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535200-5175-11-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535319-5175-16-2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Paris/Novotel Paris 13 Porte d'Italie/1741153535355-unnamed (43).jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Paris City Tour","day_summary":"

We’ll immerse ourselves in the rich history of France at the magnificent Palace of Versailles (admission not included), renowned for its stunning gardens. On our return to Paris, we’ll visit Montmartre, where a cable car (included) will take us up to this charming bohemian neighborhood, famous for its artists, painters, and cabarets. To fully appreciate the grandeur of Paris, we’ll embark on a panoramic city tour with a local guide, showcasing the city’s impressive avenues and iconic monuments. Afterward, we’ll return to the hotel. For those interested, there is an optional variety show in the evening.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Eiffel Tower & Seine Cruise Experience","day_summary":"

We’ll start our day in central Paris, beginning with a visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower. You´ll have the chance to go up to the second floor of this famous iron landmark (tickets included). Afterwards, we’ll enjoy a relaxing boat cruise along the Seine, which will last approximately one hour and fifteen minutes. You’ll have a free afternoon to explore the city at your own pace.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to this incredible journey. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with any last-minute needs, ensuring a smooth departure. As you reflect on the unforgettable experiences, from historic landmarks to breathtaking landscapes, we hope you take home not just souvenirs, but cherished memories that will last a lifetime. Though this adventure comes to an end, the stories and moments shared will stay with you forever.

","day_element":[{"type":"transfer","transferDetails":{"transferType":"Private","transferIn":"Cab","from":"Paris","to":"Paris Charles de Gaulle Airport","splitStops":[]}}]}]}]

packages.overview:
• Begin your journey in Hungary’s vibrant capital.

  • Explore the iconic sights and rich history of Budapest.

  • Relax in one of Europe’s largest thermal baths.

  • Travel to Austria’s elegant and cultural capital.

  • Discover Vienna’s grand architecture and royal heritage.

  • Enjoy Vienna at your own pace.

  • Journey to the fairytale city of Prague.

  • Visit the historic Prague Castle complex.

  • Explore the UNESCO-listed medieval town.

  • Bid farewell with memories of Central Europe’s finest gems.

Arrive in Budapest, Hungary’s enchanting capital straddling the Danube River, where history and modern charm blend seamlessly. Upon arrival at the airport or station, you’ll be greeted and transferred to your hotel for check-in. Take some time to relax or begin exploring the nearby surroundings. Whether it's strolling along the scenic banks of the Danube or discovering the grandeur of historic landmarks like the Parliament Building or Chain Bridge, Budapest welcomes you with its rich culture and warm hospitality. Your Central European journey begins in this captivating city known for its thermal baths, vibrant streets, and architectural wonders.

Embark on a fascinating journey through the city guided by an expert Travelxploria representative who brings history to life. Buda Castle, Fisherman's Bastion, Matthias Church, and St. Stephen’s Basilica. A tour through the heart of Budapest lets you discover both the Buda and Pest sides of the city. The guide will walk you through key historical landmarks, such as the majestic Buda Castle, the stunning Fisherman's Bastion, and the iconic Matthias Church. You’ll also visit the beautiful St. Stephen’s Basilica in Pest, which is home to Hungary’s most revered relic.

Experience pure relaxation with a visit to the renowned Széchenyi Thermal Bath, one of Europe’s largest and most iconic spa complexes. With your entrance ticket, step into a world of rejuvenation as you explore the beautifully designed neo-baroque architecture and soak in the mineral-rich thermal waters sourced from natural hot springs. Choose from a variety of indoor and outdoor pools, saunas, and steam rooms, perfect for unwinding after a day of sightseeing. Whether you're easing travel fatigue or simply indulging in wellness, the Széchenyi Spa offers a quintessential Budapest experience, blending history, health, and luxury in a truly unique setting.

The journey takes approximately 2.5 to 3 hours, offering comfortable seating and picturesque views of the countryside along the way. Departing from Budapest’s Keleti Railway Station, you’ll head west toward Austria’s sophisticated capital. Upon arrival at Vienna’s central station, make your way to your hotel and settle in. The rest of the day is free for you to begin exploring the elegant streets, grand palaces, and cultural richness that define Vienna, setting the tone for the next chapter of your journey.

Discover the elegance and imperial grandeur of Austria’s capital on a comprehensive Vienna city tour that includes entrance to the majestic Schönbrunn Palace. Begin by exploring Vienna’s most iconic landmarks such as the Ringstrasse, Hofburg Palace, St. Stephen’s Cathedral, and the Vienna State Opera, while learning about the city’s rich Habsburg history and cultural legacy. The highlight of the tour is a guided visit to Schönbrunn Palace, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, where you’ll walk through opulent state rooms and beautifully maintained gardens. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of history, architecture, and royal charm, showcasing Vienna’s timeless allure.

Enjoy a full day at leisure in Vienna, a city that effortlessly blends imperial grandeur with vibrant modern culture. Take this opportunity to explore at your own pace—perhaps stroll through the charming streets of the Old Town, relax at a traditional Viennese café with a slice of Sachertorte, or visit one of the city’s many renowned museums or galleries. For nature lovers, the beautifully manicured gardens of Schönbrunn Palace or the Prater Park offer a peaceful escape. Whether indulging in local cuisine, shopping for souvenirs, or simply soaking in the city’s timeless charm, Vienna promises a relaxing and enriching experience.

Explore Prague Castle, one of the largest and most magnificent ancient castles in the world, with a guided tour by Travelxploria. Walk through the historic Castle District, where an expert guide will share fascinating stories about its royal past and architectural marvels. Visit the awe-inspiring St. Vitus Cathedral, a masterpiece of Gothic design, and wander along the charming Golden Lane, lined with colorful historic houses. This immersive tour provides a deeper understanding of Prague’s rich heritage, blending royalty, legend, and breathtaking scenery. With Travelxploria’s seamless service, this unforgettable journey offers the best way to experience Prague Castle’s splendor.

packages.package_name: Melodies of the Alps: Switzerland & Austria Unfolded
packages.overview:
• Arrive in Switzerland’s financial hub and settle in for your Alpine adventure.

  • Explore the scenic landscapes of Heidiland and the tiny principality of Liechtenstein.

  • Discover the medieval town of Stein am Rhein and Europe’s largest waterfall.

  • Travel to the heart of the Austrian Alps via a scenic train ride.

  • Step into a dazzling world of art and crystals in Wattens.

  • Journey to Mozart’s birthplace and Austria’s cultural capital.

  • Visit the iconic hilltop fortress offering panoramic views of Salzburg.

  • Enjoy the breathtaking lakeside village and its postcard-perfect alpine setting.

  • Travel to Germany’s vibrant Bavarian capital.

  • Discover historic sites, grand architecture, and local charm in Munich.

  • Bid farewell to Central Europe with unforgettable memories.

Our dedicated representative and expert Travelxploria guide, backed by the best on-ground support staff, will lead you through the picturesque Swiss countryside that inspired Heidi’s timeless tale in Maienfeld. Wander through charming villages, lush meadows, and stunning alpine scenery before crossing into Vaduz, the heart of Liechtenstein. Here, marvel at the royal castle, historic sites, and unique cultural gems of this tiny yet fascinating country. Blending Swiss natural beauty with Liechtenstein’s rich heritage, this seamless and enriching journey promises an unforgettable day of exploration. With Travelxploria, every moment is crafted for the best experience.

Embark on a picturesque day trip from Salzburg to the fairytale village of Hallstatt, often considered one of the most beautiful places in Austria. Travel through the stunning Salzkammergut region, passing serene lakes and alpine landscapes. Upon arrival in Hallstatt, explore its charming narrow streets, colorful lakeside houses, and historic sites like the Bone House and Market Square. Enjoy a peaceful walk along Lake Hallstatt or take a boat ride for panoramic views. Don't miss the Hallstatt Skywalk for breathtaking vistas. This magical destination offers a perfect blend of natural beauty, history, and tranquility before returning to Salzburg in the evening.

packages.package_name: European Grand Tour: From Historic Streets to Modern Sights
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the dynamic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore iconic landmarks and enjoy panoramic views from the London Eye.

  • Visit two of London’s historic and architectural treasures.

  • Travel to the romantic city of Paris via Eurostar.

  • Discover Parisian highlights with a river cruise and Eiffel Tower visit.

  • Admire masterpieces at the world-renowned Louvre Museum.

  • Travel to the sunny French Riviera and check in to your Nice hotel.

  • Enjoy a scenic tour of glamorous coastal towns like Cannes and Monaco.

  • Cross into Italy with a beautiful train journey to Milan.

  • Explore the fashion capital’s historic and cultural landmarks.

  • Say goodbye to Europe with lasting memories of your incredible journey.

Arrive in the vibrant city of London, a captivating blend of royal heritage, modern sophistication, and timeless charm. Upon arrival at the airport, you’ll be warmly welcomed by a representative who will assist with your transfer to the hotel. After check-in, take some time to relax and recover from your journey. If time permits, step out for a leisurely stroll to get your first glimpse of this iconic city—perhaps catch a view of Big Ben or enjoy a cozy café nearby. Your unforgettable European adventure begins in one of the world’s most iconic capitals.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Embark on an enriching London city tour featuring entrance to two of its most iconic landmarks—Westminster Abbey and Tower Bridge. Discover the rich history of Westminster Abbey, the coronation site of British monarchs, and admire its stunning Gothic architecture. Continue to Tower Bridge, where panoramic views and the glass walkway await. Along the way, enjoy sights of Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and more, offering a perfect blend of culture, heritage, and city charm.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Discover the elegance and history of Milan with Travelxploria’s expert guide, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Start at the breathtaking Duomo di Milano, a Gothic masterpiece, before strolling through the glamorous Galleria Vittorio Emanuele II, Italy’s oldest shopping gallery. Visit the world-famous La Scala Opera House, and explore the impressive Sforza Castle, a symbol of Milan’s Renaissance glory. Walk through the stylish streets of the Brera district, soaking in its artistic charm. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support, enjoy a perfectly curated experience that blends history, fashion, and modern elegance. Let us make your Milan adventure truly unforgettable!

packages.package_name: London Paris Highlights From Big Ben to Eiffel Tower
packages.overview:
• Touch down in London and settle into the lively British capital.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with a city tour, cruise, and panoramic London Eye ride.

  • Dive into the magical world at Warner Bros. Harry Potter Studios.

  • Enjoy London at your own pace with optional activities or shopping.

  • Travel to Paris by train and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks and enjoy a scenic cruise on the Seine.

  • Take a guided tour of the opulent Palace of Versailles.

  • Admire world-famous masterpieces at the Louvre Museum.

  • Depart from Paris with wonderful memories of your European getaway.

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

packages.package_name: London & Edinburgh Discovery Urban Life and Scenic Escapes
packages.overview:
• Arrive in the iconic British capital and settle into your hotel.

  • Discover London’s top sights and enjoy breathtaking views from the London Eye.

  • Explore the picturesque villages of the Cotswolds and the historic charm of Oxford.

  • Visit royal castles, ancient wonders, and Roman heritage in a day.

  • Witness stunning coastal views and explore Canterbury’s rich history.

  • Enjoy a scenic train ride to Scotland’s historic capital.

  • Discover the fascinating history of Edinburgh Castle with a guided visit.

  • Experience the beauty and mystery of Scotland’s most iconic landscapes.

  • Say goodbye to Edinburgh and depart with unforgettable memories.

city tour with London Eye","day_summary":"

​Begin your exciting day in London with a City Tour provided by Travelxploria right after breakfast at your hotel. Explore the city's most iconic landmarks aboard an open-top double-decker bus, passing by famous sights like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London. Marvel at breathtaking views from the London Eye, the world’s tallest observation wheel, and experience the city from a new angle with a scenic River Thames cruise. With multiple stops along the route, you can step off to discover hidden gems, charming cafés, and historic streets at your own pace. As the day winds down, witness the city's magic come alive with a Panoramic Night Tour. Let Travelxploria make your London adventure unforgettable — because your dream destination is just a ride away!​

Discover Edinburgh’s most iconic landmarks on a flexible and comprehensive tour with Travelxploria, covering Edinburgh Castle, the National Museum of Scotland, Holyrood Palace, and the Royal Mile. This tour offers the perfect balance of structure and freedom, allowing you to explore the city at your own pace while enjoying insightful commentary along the way. Whether you want to dive deeper into Scotland’s history or simply take in the sights, this experience ensures you see the best of Edinburgh with the option to spend more time at your favorite stops. A must-do for first-time visitors and history lovers alike.

Embark on a breathtaking full-day tour from Edinburgh to the Scottish Highlands, exploring some of Scotland’s most iconic landscapes. Travel through the dramatic beauty of Glencoe, learn about its haunting history, and journey along the shores of Loch Ness, where you might just spot the legendary Nessie. Marvel at Ben Nevis and enjoy scenic stops in quaint Highland villages. This unforgettable adventure showcases the raw natural beauty and rich folklore of Scotland.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Leh: Land at 3,500 m and acclimatize.

  2. Leh → Nubra Valley: Cross Khardung La, the world’s highest motorable pass.

  3. Nubra Valley → Pangong Lake: Drive along the Shayok River to the blue waters of Pangong.

  4. Pangong Lake → Leh: Return via Hemis Monastery for an overnight in Leh.

  5. Leh → Kargil: Scenic transfer along the Indus River.

  6. Kargil → Srinagar: 210 km drive through mountain passes into the Kashmir Valley.

  7. Srinagar → Gulmarg → Srinagar: Day trip to Gulmarg and back.

  8. Depart Srinagar: Transfer to airport or railway for onward journey.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

After an early breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Nubra Valley via Khardungla Pass (18,380 ft), the world’s highest motorable road and the gateway to the Siachen Glacier. Enjoy breathtaking panoramic views from the top of the pass. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, visit Deskit Monastery (118 km), founded by Lama Sherab Zangpo in 1420 A.D. Upon arrival, check in at your pre-arranged camp or hotel. Later, visit Hundar village (7 km from Deskit) and experience the unique Double-Humped Bactrian Camel Safari in the mesmerizing sand dunes between Hundar and Deskit villages. Dinner and overnight stay at a hotel or camp in Nubra.

valley to pangong Lake via shayok","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, embark on a scenic drive to Pangong Lake via Shyok, Tangtse, and Spangmik, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. This route is a breathtaking shortcut offering mesmerizing landscapes. The road follows the Shyok River, ascending through rugged mountains before descending into Shayok village, a picturesque settlement surrounded by barren yet stunning terrain. Enjoy the beauty of this serene village before continuing your journey. By the afternoon, arrive at the magnificent Pangong Lake, where the crystal-clear blue waters and the majestic mountains create a surreal landscape. Spend the rest of the day soaking in the beauty of the lake. Overnight stay at a camp near Pangong Lake.

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive back to Leh, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. En route, visit the magnificent Thiksay Monastery, a 12-storied monastery of the Gelugpa order, perched on an island-like mountain offering spectacular views. The monastery is renowned for its grandeur and spiritual significance. Continue the journey with a visit to Sindhu Ghat, a serene riverside location with deep cultural and historical importance. Upon arrival in Leh, enjoy an evening at leisure exploring the local markets, where you can shop for souvenirs, handicrafts, and traditional Ladakhi items. Dinner and overnight stay at a hotel in Leh.

– Srinagar ( 210 Km. )","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast at 6:00 AM, embark on a scenic drive to Srinagar, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. En route, pass through Drass, the second coldest inhabited place on earth, where you will witness spectacular views of the famous Kargil War Peaks – Tiger Hill and Tololing Peak. Stop at the Vijay Smarak, a war memorial dedicated to the brave Indian soldiers who sacrificed their lives during the Kargil War in 1999, and pay tribute to their valor. Continue the journey through mesmerizing landscapes and reach Srinagar by late afternoon. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and relax. Overnight stay at the hotel in Srinagar.

In the morning, proceed for Gulmarg, also known as the \"Meadow of Flowers\", situated 2,730 meters above sea level. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, embark on a scenic 60 km drive, which takes approximately 2 hours. Gulmarg is renowned for having one of the best ski slopes in the world and the highest golf course with 18 holes. If the weather permits, marvel at the stunning view of Nanga Parbat, the \"Naked Mountain\", standing at over 26,000 feet, dominating the entire region. Experience an exhilarating cable car ride (Gondola) to Khilangmarg, offering breathtaking panoramic views. In the evening, drive back to Srinagar and unwind at your accommodation. Dinner and overnight stay at the hotel or a deluxe houseboat in Srinagar.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Depart srinagar","day_summary":"

The tour concludes as our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria ensures a seamless and punctual transfer to the domestic airport. We at Travelxploria sincerely thank you for your patronage and look forward to welcoming you on another unforgettable journey in the future. Safe travels.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Leh
    Land at Leh airport (3,505 m / 11,567 ft) and transfer to your hotel.
    Spend the afternoon acclimatizing and wandering through the bustling Leh bazaar.

  2. Leh → Kargil (234 km)
    Embark on a scenic drive along the Indus River, passing rugged gorges and roadside villages.
    Enjoy vistas of snow‑capped peaks as you approach Kargil by late afternoon.

  3. Kargil
    Visit the Kargil War Memorial to pay homage to the heroes of the 1999 conflict.
    Return to Leh in the evening, soaking in the dramatic mountain landscapes en route.

  4. Leh → Nubra Valley via Khardung La
    Depart early to conquer Khardung La (5,359 m), the world’s highest motorable pass.
    Descend into the verdant Nubra Valley, famed for its sand dunes and Bactrian camels.

  5. Nubra Valley → Pangong Lake via Shayok
    Drive alongside the winding Shayok River, framed by towering cliffs.
    Arrive at Pangong Lake in the afternoon and watch its sapphire waters shift hues.

  6. Pangong Lake → Leh (via Hemis)
    Pause at Hemis Monastery to admire its vibrant murals and ancient artifacts.
    Continue back to Leh for an overnight stay under the starry Ladakhi sky.

  7. Depart Leh
    After breakfast, transfer to Leh airport for your onward flight.
    Carry with you memories of high passes, serene lakes, and timeless Himalayan culture.

​

Upon arrival, you will be warmly received by our Travelxploria representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff and transferred to your hotel. Enjoy complete rest during the first half of the day to acclimatize. After a delightful lunch, if suitable, proceed to visit the famous Shanti Stupa, a stunning Japanese Pagoda built for world peace by Indian-based Japanese monks and inaugurated by His Holiness the Dalai Lama in 1985, where you can witness a mesmerizing sunset. Return to the hotel for a delicious dinner and enjoy an overnight stay in Leh.

to Kargil (234 Kms)","day_summary":"

After a delightful breakfast, embark on a scenic drive to Kargil with our Travelxploria representative, experienced tour guide, and best on-ground support staff ensuring a comfortable journey. En route, stop to visit the ancient Lamayuru Monastery, a site of immense religious importance. Historically, this monastery was so revered that even criminals seeking refuge were granted sanctuary. Perched atop a hill, its age-old bastion and unique architectural design exude grandeur. After an insightful exploration, continue your journey through breathtaking landscapes, crossing the Fotu La Pass (14,300 ft), the highest pass on this route. Upon arrival in Kargil, check in to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.

Valley/1744976893938-AdobeStock_362520422.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Leh to Nubra Valley via kharodng la world highest mortable pass.","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, embark on an exhilarating drive to Nubra Valley via Khardungla Pass (18,380 ft), the world’s highest motorable road and the gateway to the Siachen Glacier. The breathtaking views from the top of the pass are truly mesmerizing. Accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria, visit the historic Deskit Monastery (118 km), founded by Lama Sherab Zangpo in 1420 A.D. Upon arrival, check in at your camp or hotel and relax. Later, explore Hundar Village (7 km from Deskit) and enjoy a Double-Humped Bactrian Camel Safari amidst the stunning sand dunes between Hundar and Deskit villages. Conclude the day with a delightful dinner and an overnight stay at your hotel/camp in Nubra Valley.

After a delicious breakfast at the hotel, embark on a scenic drive to Pangong Lake via Shyok, Tangtse, and Spangmik, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. This breathtaking route, a shorter yet stunning alternative, follows the Shyok River, winding through rugged landscapes and ascending a mountain before descending into Shyok Village. In less than an hour, reach this charming village, surrounded by barren mountains, offering a truly picturesque setting. By afternoon, arrive at the serene Pangong Lake, where you can soak in the mesmerizing beauty of its crystal-clear blue waters against the backdrop of majestic mountains. Enjoy a peaceful evening by the lake before settling in for an overnight stay at the camp.

After a delightful breakfast, embark on your journey back to Leh, accompanied by our experienced tour guide from Travelxploria. En route, visit the magnificent Thiksey Monastery, a 12-storied monastery of the Gelugpa order, perched on an island mountain in a commanding position. This architectural marvel offers breathtaking views and deep spiritual significance. Continue your drive with a stop at Sindhu Ghat, a serene riverside destination known for its tranquil ambiance and cultural importance. Upon arrival in Leh, enjoy a leisurely evening exploring the local markets, where you can shop for souvenirs and experience the vibrant Ladakhi culture. End your day with a delicious dinner and an overnight stay at your hotel in Leh.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Leh (3,505 m / 11,567 ft)
    Land at Leh airport and transfer to hotel for acclimatization.
    Relax and enjoy the scenic surroundings of the high-altitude city.

  2. Sham Valley & Alchi (70 km)
    Explore Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, and Sangam Point.
    Visit the ancient Alchi Monastery, known for its beautiful frescoes.

  3. Leh → Nubra Valley via Khardung La (120 km, 4–5 hrs)
    Cross Khardung La, the world’s highest motorable pass at 18,380 ft.
    Visit Hunder to enjoy sand dunes and optional camel rides.

  4. Diskit Monastery Visit
    After breakfast, visit the 515-year-old Diskit Monastery.
    Witness the majestic Maitreya Buddha statue and panoramic valley views.

  5. Leh → Pangong Lake via Shey & Thiksey
    Drive through Chang La pass, visiting Shey Palace and Thiksey Monastery en route.
    Reach the stunning Pangong Lake, famous for its color-changing waters.

  6. Pangong Lake → Leh via Hemis Monastery
    Return to Leh via a scenic route, stopping at Hemis—the largest monastery in Ladakh.
    Enjoy your last evening in Leh with some local shopping or relaxation.

  7. Depart Leh
    Transfer to airport for your onward journey.
    Take back unforgettable memories of Ladakh's natural beauty and culture.

Arrive at Kushok Bakula Airport, Leh – 3500m above sea level. Your Travelxploria representative will be there to assist with the transfer to the hotel. Enjoy breakfast at the hotel before 09:30 am. Rest for half a day to acclimatize to the altitude.

Lunch will be served at the hotel. After lunch, embark on a drive to visit the Shanti Stupa and Leh Palace. Later, in the evening, take a leisurely walk around the local market.

Overnight stay at the hotel (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

After breakfast, carry packed lunch for the day. Sightseeing of 1000 year old Alchi monastery the only Gompa in Ladakh region on flat ground. Thereafter proceed to the Likir Monastrey to visit the splendid three storeys Dharma Wheel Gompa. Here you’ll be awestruck with the sight of the massive Buddha statues., Indus & Zanskar river Sangam, drive along the Indus river visiting, Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and Magnetic Hill (where the cars defy gravity), Basgo Palace Hiking only and further on to Leh Hall of Fame (which has a museum of the Kargil War memorabilia) Overnight stay at the hotel (Breakfast /Lunch /Dinner)

Nubra Valley and Hundur Sand Dunes – Drive 120 Kms 4/5hrs","day_summary":"

After breakfast, your Travelxploria representative will assist you in driving to Nubra Valley via Khardungla Pass, the highest motorable road in the world (18,380 ft). Arrive at Hundur by afternoon. After lunch, you will have the rest of the day free to explore Deskit and Hunder Villages. You can also enjoy a thrilling camel safari in the sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village.

Overnight stay at the camp (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

After an early breakfast, your Travelxploria representative will accompany you on the scenic drive to Pangong Lake (14,500 ft), a journey of approximately 155 km (5 hours each way). En route, you will cross the Changla Pass (17,350 ft), the third highest motorable road in the world. Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, the highest saltwater lake in the world, shared by India and China, take in the stunning beauty of the lake. Enjoy the mesmerizing color changes and the serene high-altitude surroundings of the lake.

Overnight stay at the camp (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Leh (3,505 m / 11,567 ft)
    Arrive at Leh airport and transfer to your hotel for rest and acclimatization.
    Enjoy a relaxed evening soaking in the high-altitude atmosphere.

  2. Leh – Alchi – Lamayuru – Alchi/Ulleytokpo (180 km)
    Drive through dramatic landscapes to visit the moon-like terrain of Lamayuru and the ancient Alchi Monastery.
    Stay overnight in the peaceful village of Alchi or Ulleytokpo.

  3. Alchi/Ulleytokpo – Leh (70 km)
    Return to Leh with scenic stops along the way including Magnetic Hill and Sangam Point.
    Spend the evening at leisure in Leh’s colorful market or cafes.

  4. Leh → Nubra Valley via Khardung La (120 km, 4–5 hrs)
    Drive over Khardung La, the world’s highest motorable pass.
    Arrive in Nubra Valley and explore the Hunder sand dunes with optional camel rides.

  5. Visit Diskit Monastery
    After breakfast, visit the 515-year-old Diskit Monastery with its massive Maitreya Buddha statue.
    Enjoy breathtaking views of the valley from the monastery hilltop.

  6. Tour of Pangong Lake
    Travel via the scenic Shayok route to the beautiful Pangong Lake.
    Relax by the lake and admire its ever-changing shades of blue.

  7. Pangong → Leh via Hemis Monastery
    Return to Leh with a visit to Hemis Monastery, the largest and richest in Ladakh.
    Enjoy your last evening in Leh with some local shopping or rest.

  8. Depart Leh
    Transfer to Leh airport for your return journey.
    Depart with unforgettable memories of Ladakh’s landscapes and culture.

Upon arrival at Kushok Bakula Airport, Leh (3500m above sea level), our Travelxploria representative will assist with your transfer to the hotel. Enjoy a delicious breakfast at the hotel before 09:30 am. The rest of the morning will be free for rest and acclimatization.

After lunch at the hotel, you will be driven to visit Shanti Stupa and Leh Palace, with the chance to explore the local area. In the evening, take a leisurely stroll around the local market.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

Thereafter, our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will lead you to the Likir Monastery, where you’ll marvel at the splendid three-story Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues. Continue your journey to the Indus & Zanskar River Sangam, and drive along the Indus River, stopping to visit the Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and Magnetic Hill (where cars defy gravity).

Next, enjoy a short hike to Basgo Palace before proceeding to the Leh Hall of Fame, which houses a museum dedicated to the Kargil War memorabilia.

Overnight stay at the hotel.

Arrive at Hundur by the afternoon. After lunch, you will have free time to explore the picturesque Deskit and Hunder Villages. Don’t miss the opportunity for a camel safari on the famous sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village.

Overnight stay at the camp.

After an early breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you on a scenic drive to Pangong Lake (14,500 ft), passing through Changla Pass (17,350 ft), the third highest motorable road in the world. Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, which is the highest saltwater lake in the world, shared by India and China, you'll have time to admire the stunning beauty of the lake. Relax by the shores, marveling at the changing colors and the fascinating high-altitude setting of the lake.

Overnight stay at the camp.

packages.overview:
1. Arrive Srinagar Airport – Begin your journey amidst the lush valleys of Kashmir.

  2. Srinagar – Sonamarg – Kargil (250 km / 7–8 hrs) – Scenic drive via Zoji La to reach Kargil.

  3. Kargil – Leh (6–7 hrs) – Drive through Lamayuru and Fotu La to reach Leh.

  4. Leh – Hemis – Thiksey – Shey – 3 Idiots School – Sindhu Darshan – Explore monasteries, heritage sites, and cultural landmarks.

  5. Leh – Khardung La – Nubra Valley – Hunder Sand Dunes (120 km / 4–5 hrs) – Cross the world’s highest motorable road into desert terrain.

  6. Visit Diskit Monastery – Explore the 515-year-old monastery and giant Maitreya Buddha.

  7. Nubra – Pangong Lake (155 km) – Drive via Shayok to the mesmerizing high-altitude lake.

  8. Pangong – Leh + Leh Palace & Shanti Stupa – Return via Chang La and enjoy panoramic views in Leh.

  9. Depart Leh – Transfer to airport for your onward journey.

Sonamarg Kargil 7/8 Hrs drive 250 Kms","day_summary":"

Depart from Srinagar as per road opening timings, accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide. The drive to Sonamarg unveils the spectacular countryside of Kashmir in the Sindh Valley. The Sindhu Valley, the largest tributary of the Kashmir Valley, offers breathtaking views. Continue the journey towards Sonamarg (2740 Mtrs), with a scenic drive through panoramic villages. From Sonamarg, the road becomes rougher, passing through the wet Zojila Pass (3527 Mtrs), known as the Gateway to Ladakh. Continue towards Drass, the second coldest inhabited place in the world. After another two-and-a-half-hour drive, we will arrive in Kargil (2710 Mtrs), a town that gained prominence after Ladakh opened to tourism in 1974.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

to Leh 6/7 Hrs drive","day_summary":"

Depart from Kargil after an early breakfast, accompanied by our Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide. En route, visit the Mulbekh Monastery and Lamayuru Monastery, famous for its Moonlandscape, passing through Namkila and Fatula Passes, the highest points on the Srinagar-Leh road. Continue the drive towards Leh, stopping at the 1000-year-old Alchi Monastery, the only Gompa in the Ladakh region situated on flat ground. Proceed to Likir Monastery, where you’ll be awestruck by the splendid three-storey Dharma Wheel Gompa and the massive Buddha statues.

Next, visit the Indus & Zanskar River Sangam, and continue driving along the Indus River to visit Pathar Sahib Gurdwara and Magnetic Hill, where the cars defy gravity. Further on, stop at the Leh Hall of Fame, which houses a museum dedicated to the Kargil War memorabilia.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

Tree/1742544194347-332813104.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Tour of Hemis, Thiksey Shey monastery 3 Idiots School Campus Sindhu Darshan","day_summary":"

After a leisurely breakfast, our Travelxploria representative, along with our experienced tour guide, will accompany you for a visit to Hemis Monastery, located 45 km west of Leh. Hemis is the largest and wealthiest monastery in Ladakh. After exploring Hemis, you will drive back on the same route to visit Thiksey Monastery, perched on a hillock with stunning views of the Indus Valley. Thiksey is renowned for its massive seated statue of Maitreya Buddha and its Dukhang assembly hall, which houses hundreds of prayer books, stacked between wooden covers and bound in silk.

Next, continue your journey through a series of chortens to visit Shey Palace, the former summer palace of the Kings of Ladakh. Later, you will visit the 3 Idiots School Campus and Sindhu Darshan.

Overnight stay at the hotel. (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner)

After breakfast, your Travelxploria representative and experienced tour guide will accompany you on a scenic drive to Nubra Valley via Khardungla, the highest motorable road in the world at 18,380 ft. You will arrive at Hundur by the afternoon. After lunch, you’ll have free time to explore the Deskit and Hunder Villages. Enjoy a memorable camel safari on the sand dunes between Deskit and Hunder Village, guided by the best on-ground support staff from Travelxploria.

Overnight stay at the camp (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

Upon arrival at Pangong Lake, the highest saltwater lake in the world, shared by both India and China, you will be mesmerized by the breathtaking beauty of the lake. Take in the changing colors and appreciate the fascinating high-altitude surroundings. Our best on-ground support staff will be there to assist you throughout the journey.

Overnight stay at the hotel (Breakfast / Lunch / Dinner).

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, step into a royal tapestry of Kashmir’s most spellbinding landscapes. Stroll beneath the latticed pavilions and cascading chinar trees of Shalimar Bagh and Nishat Bagh—Mughal Gardens where artful terraces and fragrant blooms whisper tales of emperors past. Glide serenely across Dal Lake in a traditional shikara, drifting among floating gardens as snow-draped peaks stand sentinel on the horizon. In Betaab Valley, wander through emerald meadows punctuated by crystal-clear streams, discovering a true alpine paradise at the foot of lofty mountains. Then, breathe in the pristine air of Aru Valley, where rolling hills and snow-capped summits beckon you into Kashmir’s untamed heart. Ascend on the Gulmarg Gondola for panoramic vistas of a winter wonderland, and finally, pay homage at Chandanwari—the sacred gateway to the Amarnath Yatra—where rugged beauty meets spiritual serenity. Each moment with Travelxploria is curated to immerse you in the timeless allure of Kashmir’s crown jewels.

Upon arrival at Srinagar airport, you will be warmly welcomed by our Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless start to your journey. Your adventure begins with a visit to the enchanting Mughal Gardens Shalimar Bagh and Nishat Bagh, where the scent of blooming flowers and the charm of Persian inspired terraces create a fairytale setting. After a leisurely stroll, check into your hotel and unwind. As the evening sets in, experience the magic of Srinagar with a traditional houseboat stay on Dal Lake. Glide through its tranquil waters on a Shikara ride, surrounded by floating gardens and snow-capped peaks. Overnight stay in Srinagar.

After breakfast, set out for Pahalgam, a scenic retreat nestled in the Kashmir Valley. Begin your exploration with a visit to the breathtaking Betaab Valley, where lush meadows and crystal-clear streams create a picture perfect landscape. Continue to Aru Valley, a paradise of rolling hills and snow capped peaks, offering a serene escape into nature. Next, head to Chandanwari, the starting point of the revered Amarnath Yatra pilgrimage, surrounded by majestic mountains. After a day filled with stunning vistas and peaceful moments, return to Srinagar.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gulmarg Day Tour","day_summary":"

After an early breakfast, set off for Gulmarg, a breathtaking destination known for its stunning landscapes and thrilling adventures. Upon arrival, take in the beauty of the ski resort, where snow-covered slopes and towering mountains create a picture-perfect setting. Experience the excitement of a Gondola ride, soaring high above the valley with panoramic views of the majestic peaks. Whether it's the serene beauty or the exhilarating altitude, Gulmarg's charm is truly unforgettable. As the day winds down, return to Srinagar, where a peaceful overnight stay awaits.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey in Kashmir comes to an end, enjoy a peaceful final morning in Srinagar, taking in the beauty of its serene landscapes one last time. After a leisurely breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out from your hotel or houseboat, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience. With hearts full of cherished memories and the warmth of Kashmiri hospitality, your driver will escort you to Srinagar Airport for your onward journey.

packages.overview: With Travelxploria, your Kashmir odyssey unfolds in a tapestry of emerald lakes, snow-draped vistas, and verdant valleys. Begin by gliding across Dal Lake’s mirror-like waters in a traditional shikara, framed by the lofty Pir Panjal Range and dotted with floating gardens. Next, ascend to new heights on the Gulmarg Gondola—Asia’s highest cable car—where panoramic views of snow-clad peaks give way to exhilarating snow activities at every turn. Journey onward to the Pahalgam Valleys, wandering through the lush meadows of Aru, the cinematic landscapes of Betaab, and the fairy-tale groves of Baisaran. Then, step into a living poem at the Mughal Gardens, where terraced lawns, tinkling fountains, and vibrant flowerbeds whisper stories of royal retreat. Venture off the beaten path to the hidden haven of Doodhpathri Meadows, a serene expanse of rolling green carpeted with pine and birch. Finally, let Travelxploria guide you to Sonmarg’s Thajiwas Glacier, where sparkling ice fields beckon for scenic treks beneath the grandeur of the Himalayas—leaving you with heart-stirring memories of Kashmir’s timeless splendor.

Embark on a scenic adventure to the serene Doodhpatri, a tranquil meadow tucked away in the heart of Kashmir’s mountains. Surrounded by snow-capped peaks and lush pine forests, the area exudes peace and beauty, perfect for a day of exploration. Stroll through the pristine landscapes, breathe in the fresh mountain air, and enjoy the peaceful solitude. After a day of bliss, return to Srinagar for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Visit to Sonmarg","day_summary":"

Set out for a full-day exploration of Sonmarg, where towering peaks and lush meadows create a mesmerizing backdrop. Visit the magnificent Thajiwas Glacier, embark on a short trek, or simply immerse yourself in the tranquil landscapes of this alpine paradise. After soaking in the breath-taking beauty of Sonmarg, return to Srinagar, where the calm ambiance of the city awaits. Unwind and rest during your overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

As your unforgettable journey through Srinagar comes to a close, our Travelxploria representative will be there to assist you with a seamless departure. Take in the last glimpses of the enchanting landscapes, the serene Dal Lake, and the majestic snow-capped peaks that have made this trip so special. The rich culture, warm hospitality, and breathtaking beauty of Kashmir will forever hold a place in your heart. With cherished memories and a soul refreshed by nature’s wonders, you’ll be transferred to the airport.

packages.overview:
Dal Lake – Stroll along its serene shores, where golden sunsets paint the sky and waters in a mesmerizing symphony of colors.
Mughal Gardens – Wander through lush terraces, cascading fountains, and historic charm, where nature and artistry blend in perfect harmony.
Gulmarg Gondola – Ascend to snowy heights on one of the world’s highest cable cars, unveiling breathtaking Himalayan vistas.
Betaab Valley – Embrace the tranquil beauty of this picturesque paradise, where lush meadows meet crystal-clear streams.
Thajiwas Glacier – Experience the thrill of snowball fights and pony rides in this majestic alpine wonderland.
Drung Waterfall – Hike through lush forests to discover a cascading marvel, where nature’s music fills the air.
Lal Chowk Market – Immerse in Kashmir’s vibrant culture, browsing handwoven Pashminas, aromatic spices, and exquisite handicrafts.
Hazratbal Shrine – Find peace at this sacred lakeside shrine, offering spiritual serenity and breathtaking views of Dal Lake.
Aru Valley – Unwind in its quiet ambiance, surrounded by pristine landscapes and towering peaks.

packages.overview:
Vaishno Devi Temple – Embark on a divine trek through breathtaking mountain trails, embracing serenity and unwavering devotion.
Shankaracharya Temple – Witness panoramic cityscapes from this ancient hilltop shrine, radiating spiritual charm and tranquility.
Mughal Gardens – Stroll through lush terraced gardens, where fountains and vibrant blooms create a timeless Persian paradise.
Dal Lake Shikara Ride – Glide across crystal-clear waters, surrounded by floating gardens and enchanting houseboats.
Pahalgam’s Lidder River – Relax by the pristine riverbanks, enveloped by lush meadows and majestic peaks.
Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Soar above snow-laden slopes, unveiling breathtaking Himalayan panoramas.
Sonamarg’s Thajiwas Glacier – Step into a winter wonderland, where shimmering ice and snowy trails mesmerize the soul.

Grand/1742457061439-Welcomheritage 2.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Hotels/Srinagar/WelcomHeritage Grand/1742457061561-Welcomheritage 4.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Srinagar Sightseeing","day_summary":"

After breakfast, set out to explore Srinagar's iconic attractions, beginning with the Shankaracharya Temple, offering panoramic views of the city and Dal Lake. Visit the beautiful Mughal Gardens like Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and Chashma Shahi. Enjoy a Shikara ride on Dal Lake and take a stroll along the picturesque Boulevard Road. In the evening, explore local markets and enjoy the serene atmosphere with an overnight stay in this charming city.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Pahalgam","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive from Srinagar to Pahalgam. The route offers breathtaking views of lush meadows, towering mountains, and the sparkling Lidder River. Upon arrival in Pahalgam, explore its charming streets, relax by the river, and enjoy the peaceful atmosphere, making it an ideal retreat to rejuvenate and soak in the tranquil surroundings. In the evening return to Srinagar & overnight stay at hotel.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Gulmarg","day_summary":"

After breakfast, embark on a scenic drive from Srinagar to Gulmarg. As you drive, enjoy stunning views of lush valleys, forests, and snow-capped peaks. Upon reaching Gulmarg, take a Gondola ride for panoramic views of the surrounding mountains and landscapes. Afterward, return to Srinagar for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Srinagar to Sonamarg","day_summary":"

After breakfast, head out for a scenic drive from Srinagar to Sonamarg. En route, pass through picturesque towns like Ganderbal and Kangan, with stunning views of rivers, valleys, and snow-covered peaks. In Sonamarg, enjoy the beautiful Sindh River and visit Thajiwas Glacier. After exploring, return to Srinagar in the evening for a restful overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and head to Srinagar Airport for your onward journey. From the tranquil Dal Lake to the majestic mountains and vibrant gardens, Srinagar has surely left lasting memories. Depart with a heart full of gratitude for the magical landscapes and cultural richness of Kashmir.

packages.package_name: Echoes of Paradise: Kashmir to Leh Expedition
packages.overview:
• Dal Lake Shikara Ride – Glide over shimmering waters, surrounded by floating gardens and Srinagar’s breathtaking, tranquil landscapes.
  • Mughal Gardens & Shankaracharya Temple – Wander through lush, symmetrical gardens before admiring panoramic views from a sacred hilltop temple.
  • Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Ascend through crisp mountain air to snow-laden peaks, soaking in spectacular, alpine scenery.
  • Sonmarg & Thajiwas Glacier – Trek through pristine, icy wonderlands framed by towering, majestic mountains.
  • Srinagar to Leh via Kargil – Journey through mesmerizing, rugged terrain, capturing Ladakh’s historic and breathtaking mountain passes.
  • Nubra Valley & Hunder Dunes – Ride double-humped camels across golden, windswept sand dunes amid striking, dramatic landscapes.
  • Pangong Lake Escape – Marvel at crystal-clear, ever-changing blue waters reflecting Ladakh’s surreal, high-altitude serenity.
  • Magnetic Hill & Gurudwara Pathar Sahib – Witness mind-bending optical illusions before finding spiritual tranquility in a sacred, peaceful haven.
  • Hemis & Alchi Monasteries – Immerse in Ladakh’s rich, monastic heritage, admiring ancient frescoes and sacred relics.
  • Leh Market Stroll – Discover vibrant, handcrafted treasures, capturing the essence of Ladakh’s artistic and cultural charm.

Later, head to the Shankaracharya Temple, perched high on a hill, offering panoramic views of the city and Dal Lake. The peaceful atmosphere and spiritual energy of these landmarks will leave you in awe of Kashmir’s timeless charm.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Gulmarg Day Tour","day_summary":"

Embark on a scenic drive to Gulmarg, a paradise for nature lovers and adventure seekers. Soar to new heights with a thrilling ride on the Gulmarg Gondola, the world’s highest cable car, offering stunning views of snow-covered peaks and lush valleys below. Whether you’re enjoying the crisp mountain air or indulging in some snow activities, the experience is unforgettable. After a day filled with awe-inspiring landscapes, return to Srinagar.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Sonamarg Day Tour","day_summary":"

Set off for the enchanting Sonmarg, a place where snow-capped peaks meet verdant meadows. Visit the breathtaking Thajiwas Glacier, a majestic expanse of ice surrounded by towering mountains, and enjoy a short trek through its pristine surroundings. The tranquil beauty of this high-altitude paradise will leave you spellbound. After a day immersed in nature’s grandeur, return to Srinagar.

Immerse yourself in the spiritual heart of Ladakh with visits to the historic Hemis Monastery and the ancient Alchi Monastery. Hemis, with its vibrant festivals and sacred relics, offers a deep connection to Ladakhi culture. Alchi, known for its centuries-old frescoes and peaceful atmosphere, transports you back in time. These sacred sites, nestled in Ladakh’s rugged beauty, provide a serene retreat for the soul. Stay in the calm town of Leh, where spiritual serenity and majestic landscapes meet.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day","day_summary":"

Before departing from Leh, take a leisurely stroll through its vibrant local markets. Wander through stalls brimming with handcrafted treasures, colorful textiles, and intricate jewelry, a perfect way to capture the essence of Ladakhi culture. As you soak in the sights and sounds one last time, the majestic mountains and peaceful atmosphere of Leh linger in your heart. Afterward, head to Leh Airport for your departure, carrying memories of an unforgettable journey through this magical region.

packages.overview:
Golden Temple – Witness the shimmering beauty of this sacred site, where spirituality and serenity merge in divine harmony.
Jallianwala Bagh – Step into history at this poignant memorial, echoing tales of courage and sacrifice.
Wagah Border Ceremony – Feel the patriotic fervor as India and Pakistan’s guards perform the electrifying Beating Retreat ceremony.
Vaishno Devi Trek – Embark on a soul-stirring pilgrimage through breathtaking mountain trails to seek blessings at the revered shrine.
Betaab Valley – Stroll through lush meadows surrounded by snow-capped peaks, a scene straight out of a fairytale.
Dal Lake Shikara Ride – Drift across glistening waters on a traditional wooden boat, absorbing Kashmir’s ethereal charm.
Mughal Gardens – Walk through timeless elegance in these Persian-style gardens, filled with cascading fountains and vibrant flowers.
Sonamarg’s Thajiwas Glacier – Experience a winter wonderland, where icy landscapes and adventure come alive.
Gulmarg Gondola Ride – Ascend to breathtaking heights, surrounded by panoramic views of endless snow-capped mountains.
Martand Sun Temple – Marvel at the ancient ruins, where history, spirituality, and stunning architecture intertwine.
packages.structure_date:
[{"city":"Amritsar","country":"India","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/India/Amritsar/1745515890825-AdobeStock_47862524.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Amritsar/1745515891712-AdobeStock_311740081.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/India/Amritsar/1745515891838-AdobeStock_549638112.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Amritsar","day_summary":"

Arrive in Amritsar and immerse yourself in the spiritual heart of the city. Your first stop is the iconic Golden Temple, one of the most revered pilgrimage sites in the world. Marvel at the stunning architecture, serene surroundings, and the shimmering reflection of the temple in the holy water. Spend some time in quiet contemplation or walk around the peaceful Sarovar. In the evening, experience the tranquility of the temple as night falls, before heading to your hotel for a restful stay.

After breakfast, visit Jallianwala Bagh to explore the historical site of the 1919 massacre. Next, head to the Maharaja Ranjit Singh Museum to learn about the great Sikh ruler. Visit the Durgiana Temple, resembling the Golden Temple, before enjoying a traditional lunch. In the afternoon, explore the Partition Museum, then head to Wagah Border for the flag-lowering Beating Retreat Ceremony. Finish the day with shopping at Hall Bazaar and a delicious dinner before returning to your hotel.

After your visit to Amritsar, head towards Katra, a town nestled in the picturesque foothills of the Trikuta Mountains. Upon arrival, check into your hotel and unwind in this peaceful, serene town. Take a leisurely stroll through the quaint streets of Katra, explore local markets for souvenirs, and enjoy the scenic beauty surrounding the area. Relax and indulge in the tranquil environment, making it the perfect place to recharge and enjoy some downtime before your next adventure.

Embark on a spiritual journey from Katra to the sacred Vaishno Devi Temple, nestled high in the Trikuta Mountains. The trek, which spans about 12 kilometers, offers stunning views of the surrounding hills and forests. Along the way, you’ll experience the serene atmosphere and the devotion of fellow pilgrims. Upon reaching the temple, pay your respects and take in the spiritual energy of the place. Return to Katra for a restful night’s stay after a fulfilling day of devotion.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Katra and drive to Pahalgam . As you travel, enjoy breathtaking views of the majestic mountains and the serene Lidder River. Pass through the Chenani-Nashri Tunnel, India’s longest road tunnel, with cutting-edge tunnel control systems. Arriving in Pahalgam in the evening, you’ll be captivated by its lush meadows and picturesque beauty, a perfect blend of nature and tranquility. Enjoy a peaceful overnight stay in this idyllic hill station.

After breakfast, hire a local taxi to explore the stunning attractions around Pahalgam such as Betaab Valley, Aru Valley, and Chandanwari, as outside tourist vehicles are not allowed in these areas. Enjoy the mesmerizing views of lush landscapes and serene beauty. In the evening, proceed towards Srinagar. On the way, make a stop to visit the historic Martand Temple near Anantnag, an ancient sun temple. Arrive in Srinagar for an overnight stay, ready to continue your exploration.
